title: The Chills: The Triumph and Tragedy of Martin Phillipps
original_title: The Chills: The Triumph and Tragedy of Martin Phillipps
overview: The story of lyrical genius, Martin Phillipps and his band, The Chills, is a cautionary tale, a triumph over tragedy, and a statement about the meaning of music in our lives.
